chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-830 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.4053/24. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.4054/24 4. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025. Mr. Yasir Khoso, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh a/w Farhan Khan Dayo Senior A.O HMC. Learned A.A.G submits statement stated therein that dues amounting to Rs.1,249,092/- of Petitioner have been paid and credited in his Account. After such statement, learned counsel for Petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of Petition. Accordingly, the instant Petition is disposed of alongwith pending Application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
